category_sources: Official homepage says Irssi is a modular text-mode chat client with IRC support built in.
source_facts.description says it is a modular IRC client.
display_name_sources: Official homepage heading and project name use Irssi.
docs_sources: Official Irssi documentation page lists user manual, built-in help, settings, scripting, and security information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/irssi/irssi; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes text-mode chat, IRC support, modules, themes, and scripting.
source_facts.description identifies a modular IRC client.
